sqlCommands.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, TTY, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150001' as GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt + ' roll 2' as Assgnmt, '824' as TTY, 'U1801' as ProdCode,Amt1, Amt2 , '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' and GL = '5600062')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, '5600000' as GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt + ' roll 3' as Assgnmt, PTF, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' and GL = '5600062' and not Assgnmt = '6917000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1, Amt2) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, '2150001' as Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL Like '6917%' and Flex1 = '5600000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1, Amt2) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, '2150001' as Flex1, 'U3010' as Flex2, Flex3, Amt1, Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL Like '6917%' and Flex1 = '5600000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1, Amt2) (Select '[batchID]-data2' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt2 = 0
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (BusCat = 'XX' or BusCat is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr,Period,Ledger, Co, GL, PC, CC, BusCat, Flex1, Amt2, Flex4) (Select KeyID, Yr,Period, 'UG' as Ledger, Co, GL,PC, CC,BusCat,Flex1,round(sum(-Amt2),2) as Amt2, 'pass1' as Flex4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Yr,Period, Co, GL, PC, CC, BusCat, Flex2)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt2 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, coalesce(TTY,'') as TTY, coalesce(ProdCode,'') as ProdCode, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600000' and Assgnmt like '6917%' and not Assgnmt like '%roll 3'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
Update TransX set Flex1 = (case when GL like '6917x%' then '5600062' else '5600000' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Co like '9%'

Update x set Flex2 = m.UD3 from TransX x inner join osAccountMap3 m on x.GL >= m.GL_From and x.GL <= m.GL_Thru and m.Co_Thru = '9999' and m.TTY = '' and m.BC_From = '' and m.TP_From = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Co like '9%'
Update TransX set Flex1 = '6820000',Flex2 = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Co like '9%' and GL = '6820000'
Update TransX set Flex2 = 'U3451' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Co like '9%' and GL in ('6420000','6420001','6420003')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1, Amt2) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, '5600062' as Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL Like '6917%')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1, Amt2) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, '5600001' as Flex1, 'U3010' as Flex2, Flex3, Amt1, Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL Like '6917%' and Flex1 = '5600000')
Update x set x.Flex5 = y.Product from TransX x inner join PCtrs y on x.PC = y.PCtr where KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set PC = '7' + m1.field2 + m2.field2 + 'ANTP0' from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m1 on m1.Field1 = x.Co and m1.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m1.ID = 'PC' and m1.Descr = 'Co' inner join Misc_Tables m2 on m2.Field1 = x.Flex5 and m2.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m2.ID = 'PC' and m2.Descr = 'Product' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Co like '9%'
Update TransX set PC = '5500000000' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Co like '9%' and Flex5 = 'Investment'
Update TransX set PC ='7CACAANTP0' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Co like '9%'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, Amt1, Amt2) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, '5600000' as GL, Crcy, PC, GL + ' U3010' as Assgnmt, 'U3455' as PTF,Amt1, Amt2  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and GL in ('5600001','5620000'))

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, Amt1, Amt2) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, '5600000' as GL, Crcy, PC, GL + ' U3010' as Assgnmt, 'U3010' as PTF, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and GL in ('5600001','5620000'))

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, Amt1, Amt2) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, 'prior runs' as Assgnmt, PTF, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and Flex3 = '2')
Update TransX set Co = '9005'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LS-SING'
Update TransX set Co = '9006'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-CAD '
Update TransX set Co = '9231'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-HUDC'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, Amt1, Amt2,PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, TTY, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150001' as GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt + ' roll 1' as Assgnmt, '603' as TTY, 'U1801' as ProdCode, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' and GL = '5600062')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, TTY, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150001' as GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt + ' roll 1' as Assgnmt, '610' as TTY, 'U1801' as ProdCode,Amt1, Amt2 , '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' and GL = '5600062')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, TTY, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150001' as GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt + ' roll 2' as Assgnmt, '612' as TTY, 'U1801' as ProdCode, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' and GL = '5600062')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, '5600000' as GL, Crcy, PC, '6917000 roll 3' as Assgnmt, 'U3010' as PTF, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' and GL = '5600062' and not Assgnmt = '6917000' group by KeyID, Co, Crcy, PC)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Amt1, Amt2, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, '4398600' as GL, Crcy, '5500000000' as PC, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' group by KeyID, Co, Crcy)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, coalesce(TTY,'') as TTY, coalesce(ProdCode,'') as ProdCode, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0')

insert into TransX (KeyID,PC,Broker,Hierarchy,Division,Region,Location,Zone,Contract,BusCatDesc,Txt,RefKey3,Pcdesc,Flex2,Flex1,Flex3,CC,ReinLoc,ReinName,RiskTerr,SubProd,Ccdesc,Flex4,GL,TTY,ProdCode,TransCode,PTF) (Select '[batchID]',RI_Code,InterCo_3rds,BS_Class,RI_Section,RI_Contract,RI_Model,RI_Component,RI_Sub_Component,RI_Onerosity,RI_Movement,RI_Sub_Movement,RI_Sub_Movement_2,RI_String,RI_Rpt,OS_Account_Name,OS_Account,OS_Flow,OS_UD1,OS_UD3,OS_UD5,OS_Rpt,OS_Rpt_Name,SAP_GL,SAP_TTY,SAP_ProdCode,SAP_TransCode,SAP_PTF from RI2OS)
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2004','2005','9005') and not substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LS-SING'
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2006','9006') and not substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-CAD '
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2310','9231') and not substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-HUDC'
update TransX set Amt1 = coalesce(Amt1,0), Amt2 = coalesce(Amt2,0) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not GL like '682%' and substring(CC,4,1) in ('E','I') and not Flex3 = '4'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '682%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and '[version]' = 'First' and Flex3 = '2'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, Amt1, Amt2) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, Flex1 as GL, Crcy, PC, GL as Assgnmt, Flex2 as PTF,Amt1, Amt2  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and Flex3 = '1')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, Amt1, Amt2) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, '5600000' as GL, Crcy, PC, GL as Assgnmt, 'U3455' as PTF, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and Flex3 = '1')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, Amt1, Amt2) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, '2008' as Co, Flex1 as GL, 'USD' as Crcy, '5500000000' as PC, 'I-' + GL as Assgnmt, Flex2 as PTF,Amt3, Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and Flex3 = '4')
update TransX set Txt = 'IFRS-17 Exp Reclass', SubProd = 'G28' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, PC, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4, Flex6) (select KeyID, Co, GL, PC, TP, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt4,0)),2) as Amt4, 'pass1' as Flex6  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, PC,TP)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 is NULL
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = c.Name from TransX t inner join TPs c on t.TP = c.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Division from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Descr = 'All Divisions' and m.Table_ID = 'Flux' and m.ID = 'Rpt' inner join ElimSelect e on e.FromVal = p.Division and e.ElimID = 'Co:' + m.Field1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.Hierarchy is NULL

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Region from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Descr = 'All Divisions' and m.Table_ID = 'Flux' and m.ID = 'Rpt' inner join ElimSelect e on e.FromVal = p.Region and e.ElimID = 'Co:' + m.Field1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.Hierarchy is NULL

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Location from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Descr = 'All Divisions' and m.Table_ID = 'Flux' and m.ID = 'Rpt' inner join ElimSelect e on e.FromVal = p.Location and e.ElimID = 'Co:' + m.Field1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.Hierarchy is NULL

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Zone from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Descr = 'All Divisions' and m.Table_ID = 'Flux' and m.ID = 'Rpt' inner join ElimSelect e on e.FromVal = p.Zone and e.ElimID = 'Co:' + m.Field1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.Hierarchy is NULL

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Hierarchy from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Descr = 'All Divisions' and m.Table_ID = 'Flux' and m.ID = 'Rpt' inner join ElimSelect e on e.FromVal = p.Hierarchy and e.ElimID = 'Co:' + m.Field1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.Hierarchy is NULL

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Division from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Descr = 'All Divisions' and m.Table_ID = 'Flux' and m.ID = 'TabSelect2' and p.Division like m.Field2 and m.Field2 <> '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Region from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Descr = 'All Divisions' and m.Table_ID = 'Flux' and m.ID = 'TabSelect2' and p.Region like m.Field2 and m.Field2 <> '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Location from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Descr = 'All Divisions' and m.Table_ID = 'Flux' and m.ID = 'TabSelect2' and p.Location like m.Field2 and m.Field2 <> '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Zone from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Descr = 'All Divisions' and m.Table_ID = 'Flux' and m.ID = 'TabSelect2' and p.Zone like m.Field2 and m.Field2 <> '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Hierarchy from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Descr = 'All Divisions' and m.Table_ID = 'Flux' and m.ID = 'TabSelect2' and p.Hierarchy like m.Field2 and m.Field2 <> '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Division from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Descr = 'All Divisions' and m.Table_ID = 'Flux' and m.ID = 'TabSelect1' and t.Co = m.Field2 and p.Division like m.Field3 and m.Field3 <> '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Region from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Descr = 'All Divisions' and m.Table_ID = 'Flux' and m.ID = 'TabSelect1' and t.Co = m.Field2 and p.Region like m.Field3 and m.Field3 <> '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Location from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Descr = 'All Divisions' and m.Table_ID = 'Flux' and m.ID = 'TabSelect1' and t.Co = m.Field2 and p.Location like m.Field3 and m.Field3 <> '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Zone from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Descr = 'All Divisions' and m.Table_ID = 'Flux' and m.ID = 'TabSelect1' and t.Co = m.Field2 and p.Zone like m.Field3 and m.Field3 <> '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Hierarchy from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Descr = 'All Divisions' and m.Table_ID = 'Flux' and m.ID = 'TabSelect1' and t.Co = m.Field2 and p.Hierarchy like m.Field3 and m.Field3 <> '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Flex1 = m.Field1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Field2 = t.Co and (t.Hierarchy like m.Field3 or m.Field3 = '') where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'Flux' and m.ID = 'TabSelect1' and m.Descr = 'All Divisions'

update TransX set Flex1 = m.Field1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Field2 = t.Hierarchy or m.Field2 = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'Flux' and m.ID = 'TabSelect2' and m.Descr = 'All Divisions' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = Co where KeyID = '[batchID]' and 'All Divisions' like '% by Co'
update TransX set Flex2 = m.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.GL >= m.Field1 and t.GL <= m.Field2 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'Flux' and m.ID = 'GLgrp'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Gross DAC' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '18%'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Ceded DAC' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '287%'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, GLdesc, TP, TPname, Flex2, Hierarchy, Flex1, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4, Flex5) (select KeyID, Co, GL, GLdesc, TP, TPname, Flex2, Hierarchy, Flex1, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt4,0)),2) as Amt4, 'pass2' as Flex5  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, GLdesc, TP, TPname, Flex2, Hierarchy, Flex1)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0 and Amt4 = 0
update TransX set PC = '1002000000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = '2200' and PC like '4059%00' and BusCat = 21 and Flex2 = 'offset'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0
